ddt:Target.Name: DC4_X95_X91_X38_X43_vdiag04_V2.4.9
ddt:Target.Description:
BVA DC4 TCU Software version : P5.25 and after (DiagOnCAN) Vehicle : X95 X38 K9Ks4 November 2010 Authors : G. DALPONTE, J. BUET, T. GUYOT, M. NICOLAESCU (mihai.nicolaescu@renault.com) DED DFS v2.16 Historic: P5.25 - addition of datas and DIDs snapshots - suppression of unused data and DIDs - suppression of DTCs $09041Ch, $174529h, $174629h, $177694h - removal of screens Read Clutch 1 Data (from $21) and Read Clutch 2 Data (from $21) from After-sales / Plants and into Development - replacement of Clutch Teach-In Step 3 screen by Clutch Teach-In Step 3.1 and Clutch Teach-In Step 3.2 screens - replacement of Clutch Teach-In Step 2 screen by Clutch Teach-In Step 2.1 and Clutch Teach-In Step 2.2 screens P5.28 - suppression of DTC $177594h - Removal of Output Shaft Speed Sensor (DTC $1760h) P5.30 - change requests $31050000010000 and $31050000020000 to $3105000001 and $3105000002 - addition of Approval Number screen P5.31 - TRS2 information changed from After-sales/Plant to developpement P6.03 - Internal TCU Temp correction - Shiftdrum motor position conversion corrected - Deletion of the 'Error State' screen - Deletion of the 'Diag flag' screen - Deletion of the 'DCT Scheme' screen - Deletion of the ' LHM Flag' screen - Deletion of the ' Clutch replacement teach in vehicle' screen - Deletion of the ' Reset clutch data' screen - Deletion of the ' Set clutch data' screen - Deletion of the ' Read clutch 1' and ' Read clutch 2' screens - Deletion of the ' $2169' screen - ' Gearbox status' screen moved to After sales - ' Output control' screen moved to After sales Deletion of the DTC $1754 and $0780 - Diag. spec usage cleanup 36-00-13/--A and 36-00-13/--B ==> Deletion of 36-00-13/--A ReadDTC request - ' Tracability 2184' screen moved to developpment
P6.20 DED DFS v2.29 Set clutch green flag routine added for Clutch 1 and 2 Engage appropriate gears routine added for Clutch 1 and 2 Clutch torque cycle control request added for Clutch 1 and 2.
P6.21 Failure Type AA added
V.2.4.8 Added request 3062 - Shiftdrum motor PWM control
V.2.4.9 Modified ApprovalNumber data: for 0 is N/A Added $3B2901000001 Added $3B2902000001 Added "Steps after MAM replacement" screens Added "Steps after CLUTCH replacement" screens Modified $3B2F01000002 Modified $3B2F02000002 Modified $22 $2C46 Modified $22 $2096 Modified $22 $203C Modified $21 $42 Modified $21 $43 Modified $21 $44 Modified $21 $45 Modified $21 $46

Item.Text: Routine aborted due to an error
FM (Freq. Mod.) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod.) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Freq. Mod.) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod.) Failures
Circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
sig. bias lvl out of range / zero adjust. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Comp. or system operation obstructed or blocked
Manual up/down switches at shift lever
MAM or gb mech part 1 or clu1 sync timeout
MAM or gb mech part 2 or clu2 sync timeout
MAM or gearbox mech part1 unexpected SD standstill
MAM or gearbox mech part2 unexpected SD standstill
CAN mean effective torque information invalid
CAN engine torque without GB request info. invalid

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Mileage counter since last LH occured

Item.Text: Error plausibility between ISS1 and engine
Error plausibility between ISS2 and engine
Error plausibility between axle speed and OSS
shifter and TRS_0/1 are different to each other
Shift drum is in emergency state
Shift drum is in emergency state

Data.Name: Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Item.Text: Engine speed error (missing CAN / CAN error value)
Engine torque expected by driver error

Data.Name: Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Misc switches.Misc switches
Data.Comment: paddle up, down, man up, down

Data.Name: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Brake sw. Handbrake status

Item.Text: Manual up/down switches at shift lever
MAM or gearbox mech part1 unexpected SD standstill
MAM or gearbox mech part2 unexpected SD standstill
MAM or gb mech part 1 or clu1 sync timeout
MAM or gb mech part 2 or clu2 sync timeout

Data.Name: Engine speed req
Data.Comment: Engine speed received on the CAN from ECM

Data.Name: Engine speed
Data.Comment: Engine speed received on the CAN from ECM

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
Engine stopped by other causes xx1x
Engine stopped by normal system request x1xx
Engine stopped by normal driver request 0000
flash page can not be restored
EEPROM is initialized with default data
PWL not equal Fly pat., Driving Cycle not finished

Input shaft speed gradient too high

Data Byte 1
Data.Comment: Actuator error status on shift drum 1

Data.Name: Data Byte 2
Data.Comment: Actuator error status on shift drum 2

Data.Name: Data Byte 3
Data.Comment: Reference drive error status on shift drum 1

Data.Name: Data Byte 4
Data.Comment: Reference drive error status on shift drum 2

Data.Name: Data Byte 5
Data.Comment: Encoder error status on shift drum 1

Item.Text: Setpoint for incremental encoder is out of range
Value of incremental encoder above upper limit
Value of incremental encoder below upper limit
Angular speed is out of range

Data.Name: Data Byte 6
Data.Comment: Encoder error status on shift drum 2

Item.Text: Setpoint for incremental encoder is out of range
Value of incremental encoder above upper limit
Value of incremental encoder below upper limit
Angular speed is out of range

FF SHIFT Synch Speed 2.Shift Drum 2 Internal Target Gear
Time to reach target position sd 1
Time to reach target position sd 2

upper position of shiftdrum 1 determined by reference drive

upper position of shiftdrum 2 determined by reference drive

emergency request on shiftdrum 2 during last run

last executed reference drive sd1 was faulty
refpoint drift of shifdrum 2 was detected during last run
refpoint drift of shifdrum 1 was detected during last run
input shaft 1 speed error status for error storage
input shaft 2 speed error status for error storage

DataItem.Name: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Comment: Plausibility between ISS1/2 and engine, between axle speed and outputspeed, wheelspin at front axle

Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status

Label.Text: This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values
For steps 1.01 to 1.10, press button once, wait 3 sec and press it once more

Button.Text: Reset clutch 1 actuator in opening direction (step 1.05)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction

Button.Text: Reset clutch 2 actuator in opening direction (step 1.06)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction

Button.Text: Reset clutch 1 actuator in closing direction (step 1.07)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction

Button.Text: Reset clutch 2 actuator in closing direction (step 1.08)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction

Label.Text: This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values
Wait 3 seconds before proceeding to step 2.12 so the gearbox shifts to neutral
This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values
Wait 3 seconds before proceeding to step 2.22 so the gearbox shifts to neutral
This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values
This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values
This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values
Press button once and wait 3 seconds

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction
Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction
Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction
Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction
Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction
Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction
Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction
Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction

Label.Text: RESET ALL RELEVANT DATA AFTER MAM REPLACEMENT
For steps 1 to 10, press button once, wait 2 sec and press it once more
1.11. Swithch ignition off, wait for 5 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.
Shift lever in P | Ignition ON | Engine NOT running

Button.Text: 1.2.1. Reset clutch 1 actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction

Button.Text: 1.2.2. Reset clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction

Button.Text: 1.3.1. Reset clutch 1 actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction

Button.Text: 1.3.2. Reset clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition ON | Engine NOT running
Shift lever in P | Ignition ON | Engine NOT running
Shift lever in P | Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Brake pedal PRESSED | Battery voltage > 9 V
Wait 3 seconds before proceeding to step 5.1.2 so the gearbox shifts to neutral
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Brake pedal PRESSED | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Brake pedal PRESSED | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Lever in P
7.3. Swithch ignition off, wait for 5 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.

Send.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P

Display.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P status

Label.Text: Lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED

Screen.Name: Step 1. Reset all relevant clutch data after clutch replacement

Label.Text: RESET ALL RELEVANT CLUTCH DATA AFTER A PART OF THE CLUTCH SYSTEM REPLACEMENT
For steps 1 to 11, press button once, wait 2 sec and press it once more
11. Swithch ignition off, wait for 5 seconds and then shift ignition ON again.
Shift lever in P | Ignition ON | Engine NOT running

Button.Text: 2.1. Reset clutch 1 actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction

Button.Text: 2.2. Reset clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction

Button.Text: 3.1. Reset clutch 1 actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction

Button.Text: 3.2. Reset clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition ON | Engine NOT running
Shift lever in P | Ignition ON | Engine NOT running
Wait 3 seconds before proceeding to step 4.1.2 so the gearbox shifts to neutral
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Brake pedal PRESSED | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Brake pedal PRESSED | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Shift lever in P | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
5.3. Swithch ignition off, wait for 5 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.
Wait 3 seconds before proceeding to step 7.1 so the gearbox shifts to neutral
Brake pedal PRESSED | Engine speed above 4000 rpm
7.2.3. Swithch ignition off, wait for 5 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.
Brake pedal PRESSED | Engine speed above 4000 rpm
Lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Wait 3 seconds before proceeding to step 12.1 so the gearbox shifts to neutral
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Shift lever in P | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Shift lever in P | Gearbox in NEUTRAL

Display.DataName: Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Display.DataName: Mileage counter since last LH occured
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Mileage counter since last LH occured

Display.DataName: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status

Label.Text: THIS PROCEDURE IS TO BE USED ONLY IN CASE OF BAD TOUCH POINT ADAPTATION TEACH-IN
